classifications.rationale: Used as a toy, structured, imported-repo, and Zenodo SU(2) benchmark ratio. It is not a W, Z, Higgs, or photon property.
Internal bosonic spectral ratio used for control and imported-repo benchmark comparison. No physical particle mapping is validated.
